title: 历史画卷中的非遗文化
author: 大卫叔的AI旅程
prompt:
历史画卷中的文化：
敦煌的飞天舞、四川的变脸艺术、少林功夫。


超真实的3D杰作，以一幅宏伟壮丽的传统水墨历史画卷为背景。此场景展现了[此处填写地点或主题]的文化精髓与无形的文化遗产，其中包含[具体形象](例如：演奏琵琶的飞天或京剧中的武将)，他们仿佛从画卷中跃然而出。  
- **构图：**角色打破了第四墙的界限，从平面纸张过渡到3D空间；动态的姿势捕捉到了关键时刻的场景。  
- **视觉效果：**纸张表面的2D黑色水墨笔触完美地转变为高度真实的3D皮肤、飘逸的丝绸服饰以及精美的刺绣
prompt_en:
历史画卷里的文化：
敦煌飞天舞，四川民间变脸艺术，少林功夫。
提示词评论区见 https://t.co/f63Q4DU1nm
提示词：
Hyper-realistic 3D masterpiece, set against a magnificent, endless traditional ink-wash historical scroll painting unfurling across the background.The scene visualizes the cultural soul and intangible heritage of [在此处填入地点或主题], featuring [在此处填入具体形象，如：a Flying Apsara playing the Pipa / a Peking Opera warrior] leaping vividly from the scroll.• Composition: The character breaks the fourth wall, transitioning from the flat paper into the 3D space. Dynamic pose capturing a moment of peak action.• Visual Effect: 2D black ink brushstrokes on the paper surface morph seamlessly into high-fidelity 3D realistic skin, flowing silk fabrics, and exquisite embroidery.• Details: Faded ancient parchment texture, floating historical calligraphy characters, red seal stamps, [可选细节：falling flower petals / glowing musical notes / swirling smoke].• Lighting: Dramatic stage lighting or ethereal divine glow illuminating the character, contrasting with the monochrome ink background. Subsurface scattering on skin.• Specs: 8K resolution, high detail, Unreal Engine 5 render, cinematic composition.--ar 16:9 --stylize 350 --no buildings, rigid structures, modern clothing, cartoons, low resolution
----------------------------
变脸艺术：
[具体形象] ：a Sichuan Opera performer changing masks, breathing fire
[细节] ：sparks and flames blending with ink splashes
感谢老师转发~~

title: 警方照片风格
author: @Artedeingenio
prompt:
将此图像转换为逼真的警察面部照片。
添加带有高度标记的灰色背景、刺眼的正面照明以及带有人名和箱号的铭牌。
照片应该看起来像联邦调查局或警察局的官方预订照片，垂直格式（4:5），表情中立，没有配饰。
prompt_en:
Transform this image into a realistic police mugshot.
Add a gray background with height markings, harsh frontal lighting, and a nameplate with the person's name and a case number.
The photo should look like an official FBI or police booking photo, vertical format (4:5), with a neutral expression and no accessories.

title: 笔记本上的电音自画像
author: @Milo_Bahi_02
prompt:
Ultra-Realistic Promotional  
使用上传的图片作为 img-to-img 参考，完整保留面部相似度与身份，创作出看似画在横线笔记本纸上的作品，使用圆珠笔、墨水与荧光马克笔，呈现逼真的墨水吸收、层层压痕、污迹、褶皱与磨损边缘。风格融合混乱的涂鸦、漫画注释与粗糙速写，线条粗细变化、笔触松散、痕迹凌乱、动态排线，整体氛围充满活力、自发且略显混乱，以 4K 超高细节渲染，外缘加粗辉光照明与鲜艳对比。采用肖像构图，头部四周加粗边框，环绕箭头、星星、下划线、潦草涂写、对话气泡、重叠笔记、复选框、俏皮图标（闪电、灯泡、音符、小型自画像漫画）以及手写漫画音效如“Aii!”与“MiLO_BAHi_02!”。应用一种风格变体：流行粗体（青色与洋红）、霓虹高亮（霓虹粉与黄色荧光笔效果）、电光涂鸦（电光蓝与霓虹红涂鸦描边）或密集速写（蓝色线稿配红色点缀，密集而生动）。
prompt_en:
Ultra-Realistic Promotional
Use the uploaded image as an img-to-img reference, preserving full facial likeness and identity, and create artwork that appears drawn on lined notebook paper with ballpoint pen, ink, and neon markers, showing realistic ink absorption, layered pressure, smudges, stains, wrinkles, and worn edges. The style blends chaotic doodle art, comic annotations, and rough sketches with thick-thin line variation, loose strokes, messy marks, dynamic hatching, and an energetic, spontaneous, slightly chaotic mood, rendered in high detail at 4k with bold outer glow lighting and vibrant contrast. Use a portrait composition with a thick border around the head, surrounding the subject with arrows, stars, underlines, scribbles, speech bubbles, overlapping notes, checkboxes, playful icons (lightning bolts, lightbulbs, music notes, a small self-caricature), and handwritten comic sound effects like “Ai!” and “MiLO_BAHi_02!”. Apply one style variation: Pop Bold (cyan and magenta), Neon Highlight (neon pink and yellow highlighter look), Electric Graffiti (electric blue and neon red graffiti outlines), or Dense Sketch (blue linework with red accents, dense and alive).

title: 奇幻水彩城市插画提示词
author: Artingent
prompt: 场景： 一座密集的山坡城市向下延伸，直至宽阔的河流港口，港口内停满了货船、渡轮和水上市场。无数紧密堆叠的建筑爬满山坡，屋顶上挤满了卫星天线、水箱和晾晒的衣物。高架人行道在建筑之间穿梭，狭窄的小巷则通向水边。远处，现代玻璃塔楼从对岸拔地而起，与古老的分层街区形成鲜明对比，凸显了这座城市广阔的城市蔓延。 风格： 奇幻手绘水彩插画风格。传统水彩渲染，带有可见的颜料飞溅、流畅的颜料扩散和柔和混合的色调过渡。精致的手绘线条，带有富有表现力的细节描绘和有机素描般的轮廓。柔和、温和的调色板，强调轻盈的色调和微妙的饱和度，而非强烈的对比。画意盎然的分层水彩纹理与插画奇幻艺术美学相结合。装饰性强、细节丰富的环境，构图中融入了许多小背景细节。优雅的完整插画处理，优先考虑手工制作的视觉魅力、艺术柔和感和经典故事书风格的奇幻渲染。
prompt_en: Scene: A dense hillside city spreads downward toward a wide river harbor packed with cargo ships, ferries, and floating markets. Countless tightly stacked buildings climb the slopes, their rooftops crowded with satellite dishes, water tanks, and hanging laundry. Elevated pedestrian walkways cross between structures while narrow alleys descend toward the waterfront. In the far distance, modern glass towers rise from the opposite shore, contrasting sharply with the older layered district and emphasizing the city's vast urban sprawl. Style: Fantasy hand-drawn watercolor illustration style. Traditional watercolor rendering with visible pigment splashes, fluid paint diffusion, and softly blended tonal transitions. Delicate hand-illustrated linework with expressive drawn detailing and organic sketch-like contours. Soft, gentle color palette emphasizing airy tones and subtle saturation rather than strong contrast. Painterly layered watercolor textures combined with illustrative fantasy art aesthetics. Decorative, richly illustrated environments with numerous small background details integrated into the composition. Elegant full illustration treatment prioritizing handcrafted visual charm, artistic softness, and classic storybook-inspired fantasy rendering.

prompt_en: 3D caricature portrait of [SUBJECT], Pixar/DreamWorks style — expressive eyes, slightly oversized head, exaggerated ears & nose, realistic skin shading with soft subsurface scattering, detailed hair, gentle warm smile, smooth polished materials, subtle fabric texture, soft ambient lighting, warm reddish-orange gradient background — balanced realism and stylized charm.

title: 情侣肖像转梦幻柔彩插画
author: Gagan Singh
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "严格使用上传的图片作为身份参考。100% 精确保留参考图片中每个人的面部匹配、面部结构、表情、肤色、发型和身份。不要增加或删除任何人。为这对情侣创造一个新的浪漫、亲密的姿势（例如：温柔的拥抱、轻柔的牵手、微妙地相互依偎），同时保持解剖结构自然且具有视觉吸引力。将调色板更改为柔和梦幻的马卡龙色，使用腮红粉、薰衣草紫、婴儿蓝、暖奶油色和浅金色点缀，同时保持肤色准确。将场景转换为高质量的浪漫插画与矢量艺术融合。使用平滑、纤细的轮廓、柔和的渐变阴影、微妙的光晕高光和最少的纹理来营造空灵的效果。服装类型应保持相似，但重新着色为与浪漫主题相得益彰的马卡龙色调，具有干净的矢量边缘和柔软的褶皱。灯光应柔和、温暖且漫射，增强浪漫氛围。背景应极简且梦幻，使用马卡龙渐变、柔和的抽象形状或漂浮的光粒子来强调亲密感。以超高分辨率渲染，具有干净的边缘、精致的分层和专业的浪漫矢量艺术效果。",
  
  "negative_prompt": "面部不匹配、身份改变、多余人物、缺少人物、错误的面部特征、错误的肤色、糟糕的解剖结构、多余的手指、多余的肢体、刺眼的颜色、写实主义、粗糙的纹理、低质量、模糊、噪点、颗粒感、水印、标志、文字",
```

{

Preserve 100% exact face match, facial structure, expressions, skin tone, hairstyle, and identity of every person visible in the reference image. Do not add or remove any person. Create a new romantic, intimate pose for the couple (for example: gentle embrace, soft hand placement, subtle leaning towards each other) while keeping anatomy natural and visually appealing. Change the color palette to soft dreamy pastels using blush pinks, lavender, baby blue, warm cream, and light gold accents, while keeping skin tones accurate. title: 俏皮涂鸦风女性插画，保留原貌的童趣手绘风格
author: Gagan Singh
prompt:
请严格按照上传的图片作为身份参考。保留相同的人物、精确的面部结构、发型、年龄、性别、身体比例和整体相似度。不得添加或删除任何人物。不得改变身份。将主体转换为杂乱、有趣、涂鸦风格的插图。

涂鸦插图风格：
创作一幅手绘涂鸦，线条要参差不齐、粗糙且夸张。线条应松散、摇摆不定且不规则，就像孩子兴奋时的涂鸦。轮廓要粗犷、断裂且不一致。绘画风格必须显得匆忙、自发且充满活力。使用可见的铅笔或蜡笔笔触，以增添凌乱、混乱的感觉。

颜色与纹理：
以一种平面、俏皮的方式使用明亮、柔和和鲜艳的颜色。颜色应该填充得没有细致的细节，模仿一种粗犷、素描本的感觉。颜色必须看起来不均匀且不完美，就像它们被快速涂鸦一样。添加一些水彩纹理，但要保持它们俏皮且不完美，就像有人用湿刷快速、生动地填充一样。

面部特征：
画出简单、夸张且略带童趣的五官。用圆点表示眼睛，用小小的波浪线勾勒出微笑，再画上小小的鼻子。五官要显得粗糙且不均匀，以增添这种俏皮、随意的涂鸦效果。表情要生动有趣，充满欢乐。

比例与形式：
比例略微夸张，头部较大，四肢简化，身体形状柔和圆润。解剖结构应看起来非常风格化且不真实。在比例上增加额外的随机性，使某些身体部位比平时更大或更小。

着色与光照：
没有逼真的阴影效果。使用粗略的铅笔笔触进行阴影处理，或使用简单的色块。光线应尽可能少，保持整个图像明亮且平坦，没有深度感。

氛围与情绪：
有趣、古怪且充满活力。氛围应该是轻松自在、自然流露的，就像故事书或学校笔记本中间随手画下的涂鸦。保持情感基调活泼且富有生机。

背景
背景应由简单、潦草的形状、柔和的涂鸦痕迹以及如波浪线、心形、星星或随机线条等抽象形式混合而成。保持背景与主题一样随意且不拘小节。

渲染规则：
没有照片级真实感，没有照片纹理，没有电影级照明，也没有数字绘画。插图应该看起来像一幅真实、混乱、潦草的涂鸦。避免锐利或清晰的边缘，避免细节上的写实。线条和颜色必须粗糙且自然。

最终输出：
这是一幅生动、有趣且略显凌乱的涂鸦风格插图，使用蜡笔或彩色铅笔绘制，线条粗犷有力，色彩柔和淡雅，以一种俏皮、随意的涂鸦风格保留了上传图像中的确切特征。
prompt_en:
Use the uploaded image strictly as the identity reference. Preserve the same person, exact facial structure, hairstyle, age, gender, body proportions, and overall likeness. Do not add or remove any person. Do not change identity. Transform the subject into a messy, fun, scribbly doodle-style illustration.

Doodle Illustration Style:
Create a hand-drawn doodle with uneven, rough, and exaggerated line art. The lines should be loose, wobbly, and erratic, like a child’s excited scribble. Outlines should be thick, broken, and inconsistent. The drawing style must look rushed, spontaneous, and energetic. Use visible pencil or crayon strokes that add to the untidy, chaotic feel.

Color & Texture:
Use bright, pastel, and vivid colors in a flat, playful way. The color should be filled in without careful detail, mimicking a rough, sketchbook feel. The colors must look uneven and imperfect, almost like they’ve been scribbled on quickly. Add some watercolor textures, but keep them playful and imperfect, as if someone has used a wet brush for a quick, vibrant fill.

Facial Features:
Draw simple, exaggerated, childish features. Dot eyes, tiny squiggly smiles, and tiny noses. Keep the features rough and uneven, adding to the playful, messy doodle effect. Expressions should be lively and fun, filled with joy.

Proportions & Form:
Slightly exaggerated proportions with a large head, simplified limbs, and soft, rounded body shapes. The anatomy should look very stylized and unrealistic. Add extra randomness to proportions, with some body parts bigger or smaller than usual.

Shading & Lighting:
No realistic shading. Use rough pencil strokes for shading or simple color blobs. The lighting should be minimal, keeping the whole image bright and flat without depth.

Mood & Atmosphere:
Fun, quirky, and full of energy. The vibe should be carefree and spontaneous, like a doodle drawn in the middle of a storybook or a school notebook. Keep the emotional tone playful and full of life.

Background:
The background should be a mix of simple, scribbly shapes, soft doodle marks, and abstract forms like squiggles, hearts, stars, or random lines. Keep the background as loose and unrefined as the subject.

Rendering Rules:
No photorealism, no photo texture, no cinematic lighting, no digital painting. The illustration should look like a true, chaotic, scribbly doodle. Avoid sharp or clean edges, avoid detailed realism. The lines and colors must be rough and spontaneous.

Final Output:
A lively, fun, and messy scribbly doodle-style illustration using crayon or colored pencil, with rough, energetic lines and flat pastel colors, preserving the exact identity from the uploaded image in a playful, carefree doodle style.

His iconic flaming red beard and long hair flow dynamically as if caught in eternal divine wind. In his powerful right hand he firmly grasps Mjolnir, his legendary hammer,
2. A majestic full-body portrait of Hua Mulan, the legendary Chinese female warrior, rendered in the sacred Dunhuang mural painting style. Mulan stands in a powerful yet graceful pose, dressed in elaborate Tang Dynasty military armor with intricate golden patterns and decorative motifs. Her armor features layered plates with cloud and phoenix designs, flowing red and gold silk sashes, and ornate shoulder guards. She holds a gleaming sword with ceremonial tassels, her posture dignified and heroic. Her face shows delicate feminine features with a determined expression, hair tied in a traditional warrior's topknot adorned with golden ornaments. The background features the characteristic Dunhuang aesthetic: rich ochre and burnt sienna tones, faded ancient textures suggesting weathered cave walls, floating celestial clouds in gold and crimson, decorative floral borders with lotus and peony motifs. Golden halos and divine light rays emanate around her figure, emphasizing her sacred heroic statu

title: 超级动物英雄
author: Kerroudjm
prompt:
这是一幅超写实的[你的动物]的1:1方形肖像，动物以英雄姿态站立，微微向左偏转头。它穿着一套有质感的深灰色超级英雄套装，这套衣服贴合身体、表面为哑光材质，能够清晰看到织物的纹理和细腻的缝线。

在动物的胸口，一个类似超人标志的金色金属圆盾内部，绣着[该国]的国旗图案（针脚非常逼真，图案略有凸起）。

动物的肩膀上披着一件由[该国]国旗设计的飘逸斗篷，斗篷上有丰富的褶皱感和自然的垂坠感。

在动物身后，应设置一个真实的国旗背景照片，整个国旗略微模糊以增强立体感，并通过柔和的阴影提升画面的现实感。

光线应温暖且具有方向性（类似摄影工作室的光线效果），突出动物的毛发质感、套装材质以及微微隆起的胸部轮廓。整体色调富有戏剧性和电影感，颜色过渡自然，避免过度的对比。动物的头部必须完全显示在画面中，不允许裁剪。
prompt_en:
A hyper-realistic square 1:1 portrait of a [YOUR ANIMAL] standing in a heroic pose, facing slightly left. The animal wears a textured dark gray superhero suit, form-fitting and matte, with visible fabric grain and subtle seams.

On its chest, inside a golden metallic Superman-style diamond emblem, is a fabric-embroidered version of the [COUNTRY] national flag (realistic stitching, slightly raised).

Draped over the animal’s shoulder is a flowing cape designed from the [COUNTRY] flag, with rich fabric folds and natural weight.

Behind the subject, use a realistic fabric backdrop displaying the full [COUNTRY] flag, slightly out of focus to add depth, with soft shadows to enhance realism.

Lighting should be warm and directional (studio-style), emphasizing the animal’s fur texture, suit material, and the contours of a subtly muscular chest. The overall tone is dramatic and cinematic, with a warm color grading and no excessive contrast. The head must be fully visible — no cropping.

author: @Mind_Boticni
prompt:
一幅超细节的、超现实水彩风格数字绘画：一位年轻女子被困在一整块高大的透明矩形冰块内部。冰块边缘粗糙龟裂，表面布满霜花纹理，可见清晰的分层与裂缝。女子仿佛悬浮于水中，周身环绕着数十颗漂浮的气泡。她身穿一件无袖、浅蓝色、贴身的连衣裙，裙摆微微扬起，仿佛受水流影响。她的身体略微蜷曲，一膝弯曲，双脚赤裸，双手贴在冰的内壁，十指张开。她浅棕色的长发向一侧飘散，营造出动感。她神情柔和却焦虑，眼神向外望去，透露出渴望与禁锢之感。

背景极简且寒冷，呈淡灰白，带有柔和的水彩晕染与冰面下方淡淡的阴影。冰块泛着蓝色调，光线折射与透明度逼真。光照柔和漫射，营造梦幻空灵的氛围。整体情绪象征、情感化且超现实，表现隔绝与脆弱。超高清分辨率、细腻笔触纹理、绘画式写实、幻想写实、电影构图、4K–8K品质。
prompt_en:
A hyper-detailed surreal watercolor-style digital painting of a young woman trapped inside a tall, rectangular block of transparent ice. The ice block has rough, cracked edges and frosted textures, with visible layers and fractures. Inside the ice, the woman appears suspended as if underwater, with dozens of floating air bubbles surrounding her. She is wearing a sleeveless, light blue, form-fitting dress that flows slightly as if affected by water. Her body is slightly curled, one knee bent, feet bare, and her hands are pressed against the inner surface of the ice, fingers spread. Her long, light brown hair flows freely to the side, giving a sense of motion. Her facial expression is soft yet anxious, eyes looking outward with a feeling of longing and confinement.

The environment is minimalistic and cold, with a pale gray-white background, subtle watercolor washes, and soft shadows on the icy ground beneath the block. The ice has a bluish tint with realistic light refraction and transparency. Lighting is soft and diffused, creating a dreamy, ethereal atmosphere. The overall mood is symbolic, emotional, and surreal, representing isolation and fragility. Ultra-high resolution, fine brush texture, painterly realism, fantasy realism, cinematic composition, 4K–8K quality.

title: 现实与卡通双重视角的街头人像创作
author: 七表哥
prompt: { "Prompt": "分析上传的参考图像，并创建一张 64K DSLR 分辨率的都市街头肖像。保留参考图像中的面部，不改变面部特征，保持相同的眼神、表情、妆容和纹理细节，保持参考图像中的发型。将此人以放松的慵懒姿势（靠在路边，手肘放在膝盖上，下巴托在手里）重现在一条安静的城市街道的水泥路边，保持其自然表情。在旁边放置一个较小的手绘卡通版同一个人，具有相同的面部特征、表情和前卫的街头服饰（腰间系着宽松的复古乐队 T 恤、高腰破洞牛仔短裤、厚底白色运动鞋和短款黑色皮夹克），以柔和的动画风格绘制，线条清晰，暖色调柔和，与怀旧复古的黄金时刻氛围相匹配。背景：纹理化的鹅卵石路面，带有细微的苔藓斑点，风化的建筑立面，带有柔和的赤陶色和灰色调，远处褪色的路牌，柔和自然的黄金时刻日光。混合媒体构图，融合了超现实街头摄影和异想天开的插画，唤起身份和自我反思的主题。电影般的真实感，Octane 渲染质量，主体面部和卡通人物清晰对焦，浅景深使背景略微模糊，服装面料和路面具有精细的纹理细节。", "text_elements": "@seven_cuz at the bottom", "aspect_ratio": "4:3" }
prompt_en: { "Prompt": "Analyze the uploaded reference image and create a 64K DSLR resolution urban street portrait.   Use the same face from the reference image without changing facial features, maintain the same eye gaze, expression, makeup and texture details, maintain the same hair style from the reference image.   Recreate this person in a relaxed slouch pose (leaning against the curb with elbows resting on knees, chin propped in one hand) on a concrete curb in a quiet city street, maintaining their natural expression.   Next to them, place a smaller hand-drawn cartoon version of the same person with identical facial features, expression, and the edgy streetwear outfit (oversized vintage band tee tied at the waist, high-waisted distressed denim shorts, chunky white platform sneakers, and a cropped black leather jacket), drawn in a soft animation style with clean outlines and warm muted colors matching the nostalgic retro golden-hour vibe. title: 生成艺术画作的法线与深度图
author: Takuma Hashimoto
prompt:
根据输入的艺术作品图像生成表面法线贴图。

输出一张 RGB 图像，其中每个像素以标准切线空间格式编码表面法线方向：
• R = X 方向
• G = Y 方向
• B = Z 方向

要求：
• 保持与输入图像相同的分辨率和纵横比。
• 法线方向必须遵循画笔笔触、阴影和轮廓所暗示的局部几何形状。
• 请勿添加新的艺术元素或重绘场景。
• 仅推断合理的微观几何结构和表面方向。
• 确保平滑、一致的法线过渡，无噪点。

根据输入的艺术作品图像生成深度贴图。

输出一张灰度深度贴图，其中：
• 白色 = 靠近观察者
• 黑色 = 远离观察者

要求：
• 保持与输入图像相同的分辨率和纵横比。
• 深度必须平滑、连续且符合物理常识。
• 仅推断原始艺术作品中可能存在的几何深度。
• 请勿添加新的物体或细节。
• 请勿对场景进行风格化、重绘或重新诠释。
• 避免纹理噪点；只关注深度结构。
prompt_en:
Generate a surface normal map from the input artwork image.

Output one RGB image where each pixel encodes the surface normal direction in standard tangent-space format:
•R = X direction
•G = Y direction
•B = Z direction

Requirements:
•Maintain the same resolution and aspect ratio as the input image.
•Normal directions must follow the local geometry implied by brush strokes, shading, and contours.
•Do NOT add new artistic elements or repaint the scene.
•Only infer plausible micro-geometry and surface orientation.
•Ensure smooth, consistent normal transitions without noise.

Generate a depth map from the input artwork image.

Output a single grayscale depth map where:
•White = near to the viewer
•Black = far from the viewer

Requirements:
•Maintain the same resolution and aspect ratio as the input image.
•Depth must be smooth, continuous, and physically plausible.
•Infer only geometric depth that could reasonably exist in the original artwork.
•Do NOT add new objects or details.
•Do NOT stylize, repaint, or reinterpret the scene.
•Avoid texture noise; focus solely on depth structure.

title: 魔法猫咪巫师贴纸设计
author: 清水勇人｜DMM .com 亀ちょく本部長 / DMMホールディングス 代表取締役
prompt: 这是一张基于用户上传图片制作的剪裁贴纸。图片中的主体被处理成Q版（chibi）风格的变形形象，具有粗重的黑色轮廓、鲜艳的平面色彩以及卡通化的姿势。右侧有竖排的日文文字“【右侧的评论】”，左侧有竖排的日文文字“【左侧的评论】”，底部边缘有文字“【下方的评论】”。**关键在于：必须使用一条连续的白色剪裁边框将所有元素完全包裹起来——包括图片和所有文字块——从而在纯白色背景上形成一个统一、便于裁剪的贴纸形状。**
prompt_en:
🍌 Nano Banana Pro プロンプト集 Vol.3
「コメント付きシール画像」
▼プロンプト文
A die-cut sticker illustration based on the uploaded image. The subject is transformed into a chibi deformed illustration style, featuring thick bold black outlines, flat vibrant colors, and a cartoon pose. Large vertical Japanese text "【右側のコメント】" on the right side, vertical Japanese text "【左側のコメント】" on the left side, and text "【下部のコメント】" at the bottom edge. **Crucially, a single, large, continuous white die-cut border must encompass all elements entirely—surrounding the illustration and all text blocks together—to create one unified, easy-to-cut sticker shape against a plain white background.**
